name: Nest
description:
No idea what I'm doing, first bot! ;-;

Don't be shy to leave a comment or whatever if you like it, criticism is fine. (It helps! A lot.)

Initial message ;

The nest room is calm for once.

Men and women cuddle in the nests around the nest room, filling the space with warm scents and soft purring. Pelts, furs, and blankets cover most of the room in little piles and nests.

There's soft giggling all around, with occasional crying from the young crawling about , playing with each other or seeking comfort or milk, the parents chatting quietly and caring for their young or for each other.
creator: Gooseyjuicey
